findings.description: The exception class `ProcessStop` is missing from s4 hints. The source termination flow describes ProcessStopHandler throwing a ProcessStop exception which ProcessResidentHandler catches to trigger graceful shutdown. A user asking how to stop a resident batch might search for this class name.
findings.source_evidence: termination flow: "ProcessResidentHandler: ここでプロセス停止要求(ProcessStop)を捕捉すると、INFOログを出力後、処理結果オブジェクトをリターンする。"

findings.description: The automated warning 'Section count 4 < source headings 6' is a false positive. The source has exactly 4 headings (1 document title + 3 h2 sections), matching the 4 knowledge file sections s1–s4. No issue exists.
findings.source_evidence: Source headings: '常駐バッチ実行制御基盤（スレッド同期型）' (h1), '基本構造' (h2), '業務アクションハンドラの実装' (h2), '標準ハンドラ構成と主要処理フロー' (h2). The `++++` lines are decorative separators, not RST section headings.
